Headunit LCD monitor camouflage

December 26, 2006

automotivemiscellaneous

This front panel, that looks like OEM radio, hides LCD monitor from public eye.


Easy and simple attachment of a dummie camouflage plate.
 
 
 

When outsider looks, there's little suspicion that there's a monitor installed behind OEM radio faceplate.
 
 
 

This is how LCD monitor appears when in use.
 
 
 

Face plate behind the scene.
